content: Better Auth Next.js integration: mount handler at /api/auth/[...all] via toNextJsHandler. getSession via auth.api.getSession({headers: await headers()}) in RSC and Server Actions. nextCookies() plugin (must be last in plugins array) is required so Server Actions that sign in/up actually set cookies. Admin plugin (better-auth/plugins) adds user management + RBAC; default roles admin/user but custom roles (editor/author) and fine-grained permissions defined via access-control statements (ac.newRole). auth.api.setRole({userId, role}). For Next.js 16 use proxy.ts (not middleware.ts) with runtime nodejs for full session checks. Session in proxy is for redirect only; re-verify in each Server Action.
